message:
fix(engine): prevent integer overflow in serde, budget, and ratio calculations

deterministic_serde.rs:
- Replace 'as u32' casts with u32::try_from().unwrap_or(u32::MAX) to
  prevent silent truncation on large inputs

dp_budget_accountant.rs:
- Replace + with saturating_add() in would_exhaust() to prevent
  overflow when budget values are near u64::MAX

aara_resource_certificate.rs:
- Widen to i128 before multiplication in ratio calculation instead of
  checked_mul().unwrap_or(0), preserving precision

polymorphic_inline_cache.rs:
- Same i128 widening pattern for hit_rate_millionths() and
  monomorphic_ratio_millionths()

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
